deviations.description: The modality change from 'permission' to 'obligation' introduces a mandatory requirement to ask for consent before retrieving personal data. The process model on page 1 shows that the phone company requests personal data from the customer before asking for consent, which directly violates the new obligation.

The compliance pattern change from 'existence_of_A' (permission to ask for consent at any point) to 'A_precedes_B' (obligation to ask for consent before retrieving personal data) is violated in the process model. The process retrieves personal data before asking for consent, failing to meet the new ordering constraint.
process_model_reference: Request personal data, Ask for consent

deviations.description: The activities are modified to require that 'ask_consent' must precede 'retrieve_personal_data'. The process model retrieves personal data before asking for consent, which is a direct violation of the new activity sequence.
process_model_reference: Request personal data, Ask for consent
